settings.heading: Join the first wave.
settings.body: The first production run of the Radio Dry Bag is on the way. Join the list to follow the build and be the first to know when it's ready.
settings.form_note: We'll email you when the first batch is ready. No spam, just the launch.

settings.title: First Access
settings.body: Be first in line when the first production run ships.
